2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX 
03 – 05 July 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 16 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  03 July 2026 
 
        Time  14:42 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Free Practice 1 
  
Fact The F1 cars below did not use the track at turns 1, 3, 4, 9, 13 and 15.
